name: mirrortrace-erasure-ledger
title: MirrorTrace AUX — Erasure-Request Ledger / Removal Tracker
description: Auxiliary actor that tracks the SELF subject's OWN removal requests over time. It reads the subject's REAL typed module_events, REUSES shared/aux/erasure-ledger.js (which reuses shared/aux/takedown-letter.js — no re-implementation of letter/statute/cluster logic), and produces one trackable LEDGER ROW per drafted request with: the controller's statutory response deadline (GDPR Art.12(3): one month +2; CCPA/CPRA §1798.130: 45 days +45) and the single date to check back (Closure Mode), so the subject verifies removal on the deadline instead of compulsively re-checking. Optionally folds in a previously-produced broker_optout_plan's erasure letters from KV. Scope-gated to self/public_figure ONLY via shared/scope.js. NO fake data: deadlines are computed deterministically from real submission dates the subject supplies; no removal outcome is invented (a row is 'removed' only when a later re-scan confirms it); no findings in -> empty ledger out; is_template:true. Patterns applied: DeleteMe/Aura consolidated removal dashboard + GDPR Art.17 RTBF deadline automation.
